result.stdout:
Description:
  Will push every missing nuget version from a nuget source to a nuget destination

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.SyncNuGets [options]

Options:
  --package-name <package-name>                             Name of the package to sync. When not provided this tool will attempt to synchronize every package from the source location. [default: *]
  --package-source <package-source> (REQUIRED)              Source url of the package store.
  --package-target <package-target> (REQUIRED)              Target url of the package store to push into.
  --package-source-token <package-source-token> (REQUIRED)  Token to access the source package store.
  --package-target-token <package-target-token> (REQUIRED)  Token to allow pushing into the target package store.
  --include-prerelease                                      When true, pre-releases will also be synced. [default: False]
  --version                                                 Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                            Show help and usage information
